arcs.description: Read the power flag without consuming it.
Inhibit on a fault: no admission while faulted.

description: A turnstile admits a ticket-holder only while power is present and no fault is raised. Power is a READ arc (require present, do not consume) and fault is an INHIBIT arc (require absent) on distinct places, so read and inhibit compose: the power token survives each admission.
name: turnstile-gate

places.description: Holds one power_flag token iff the gate has power.
places.name: power

places.description: Holds a fault_flag token iff the gate is faulted.
places.name: fault

transitions.description: Admit a ticket-holder when powered and unfaulted.
transitions.name: admit
